title: Python List and Dict Basics
description: Practice indexing a list and reading from a dictionary.
learningGoals: Read a dictionary value by key.

completionChecks.explanation: Python lists are zero-indexed, so index 0 reads the first item.

choices: The value stored for the Ada key
completionChecks.explanation: Dictionary lookup by key returns the value stored for that key.

targetCode:
# Learn: Read a sequence by index and a dict by key.
names = ["Ada", "Grace"]
scores = {"Ada": 10, "Grace": 9}  # Keys map to values.
print(names[0])
print(scores["Ada"])
